ddls:
CREATE TABLE "machinery" (
  "udi" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of machinery */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Product ID of the machinery */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of machinery */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machinery */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the machinery */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the machinery was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the machinery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the machinery (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("udi")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "udi" INTEGER /* Reference to the machinery where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, rotational speed) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_udi FOREIGN KEY ("udi") REFERENCES machinery ("udi")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "udi" INTEGER /* Reference to the machinery where the sensor is installed */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor data */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_udi FOREIGN KEY ("udi") REFERENCES machinery ("udi"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Default unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure event */,
  "udi" INTEGER /* Reference to the machinery that experienced the failure */,
  "failure_type" TEXT /* Type of failure */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the failure occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the failure */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the failure */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the failure was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details on how the failure was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failures_udi FOREIGN KEY ("udi") REFERENCES machinery ("udi")
)

CREATE TABLE "failure_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the failure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the failure type */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the failure type (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "udi" INTEGER /* Reference to the machinery that was maintained */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the maintenance activity was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_udi FOREIGN KEY ("udi") REFERENCES machinery ("udi")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, maintenance staff) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "udi" INTEGER /* Reference to the machinery that is the subject of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, maintenance) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_udi FOREIGN KEY ("udi") REFERENCES machinery ("udi")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "report_template" TEXT /* Template for the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "udi" INTEGER /* Reference to the machinery that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, failure) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_udi FOREIGN KEY ("udi") REFERENCES machinery ("udi")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
